https://openalex.org/W4391690798.kf1: Social innovation/entrepreneurship programming in US public-health schools faces sustainability concerns from insufficient funding and human resources.

https://openalex.org/W4391754567.kf1: In the first month of the Gaza bombardment, ~9% of both medical complexes and other buildings were damaged, suggesting medical facilities did not receive the special protection required by international humanitarian law.
https://openalex.org/W4391754567.effect_sizes: ~9% damage to medical complexes and other buildings (p>0.73)

https://openalex.org/W4391140802.demographics: Population-level orofacial cleft burden by age/gender
https://openalex.org/W4391140802.kf1: Orofacial cleft prevalence and DALYs declined 1990-2019 but remained high; gender inequality (GII) was associated with cleft burden in the region.
https://openalex.org/W4391140802.effect_sizes: Prevalence EAPC -0.05%; DALYs EAPC -2.10%; GII–DALY β female=0.48

https://openalex.org/W4399359480.kf1: Shared mobile phones threatened female sex workers' privacy in a sharing culture; they used various strategies to conceal sex-work information, with mental/emotional burden.

https://openalex.org/W4391539653.demographics: Men who have sex with men living with HIV
https://openalex.org/W4391539653.kf1: Social support mediated the relationship between HIV-related/family stigma and mental health among MSM living with HIV in China.
https://openalex.org/W4391539653.effect_sizes: Total effect of stigma on MH β=-1.483; social-support mediation β=-0.321

https://openalex.org/W4390884756.demographics: Substance use disorder patients in Jordan
https://openalex.org/W4390884756.kf1: COVID-19 affected substance availability, patterns of use, social life, tobacco smoking, and users' health and hygiene, informing intervention design.

https://openalex.org/W4410488872.demographics: Displaced and host women with breast cancer in northwest Syria
https://openalex.org/W4410488872.kf1: High prevalence of late-stage breast cancer, high mastectomy rates, and long treatment delays in northwest Syria; displacement was associated with significantly lower survival.

https://openalex.org/W4413272488.demographics: Forcibly displaced populations living with cancer
https://openalex.org/W4413272488.kf1: Protocol for a scoping review of cancer-care interventions for forcibly displaced populations in MENA humanitarian settings.

https://openalex.org/W4409864395.kf1: Describes the Yale-University of Jordan joint addiction-medicine training program, yielding cross-cultural education, research, and workforce-development outcomes.

https://openalex.org/W4414565634.kf1: Interventions to mitigate COVID-19 misinformation had a positive but non-significant pooled effect; more effective when participants were involved with the topic and text-only mitigation was used.

https://openalex.org/W4408977330.intervention_name: Substance-use elective course for pharmacy students
https://openalex.org/W4408977330.kf1: A novel substance-use elective increased knowledge (17.9 to 21.1/30) and improved attitudes toward harm reduction and non-stigmatizing terminology.

https://openalex.org/W4406435397.kf1: 77% of medical facilities in Mariupol were damaged during Russia's siege; damage was unrelated to facility size, suggesting intentional targeting.

https://openalex.org/W7134833267.kf1: Identified ten key ethical concepts and recommendations from 41 papers on HIV acquisition research in humanitarian crises.

https://openalex.org/W7155621521.demographics: Women with breast cancer in post-conflict Syria
https://openalex.org/W7155621521.kf1: Syria's conflict fragmented oncology care (only two radiotherapy centers remain); rebuilding requires a cancer registry, decentralized tri-modality care, and workforce investment.

https://openalex.org/W7129045923.demographics: Forcibly displaced people from the Eastern Mediterranean Region
https://openalex.org/W7129045923.kf1: Pooled prevalence of any mental-health disorder among EMR-origin forcibly displaced people was 28%, with PTSD and depression most measured and high heterogeneity.

https://openalex.org/W4388035587.kf1: Cognition improved significantly in the cognitive-training group but not controls; the number of completed sessions correlated with cognitive improvement (dose-response).

https://openalex.org/W4392291327.kf1: Striatal interneurons were decreased ~50% in Tourette syndrome brains, with impaired mitochondrial/synaptic function and microglial immune activation.

https://openalex.org/W4396811136.demographics: Children and adolescents affected by war
https://openalex.org/W4396811136.kf1: Very limited evidence exists for digital mental-health interventions for war-affected children/adolescents; the review provides a framework for developing new ones.

https://openalex.org/W4400738283.demographics: Brazilian High-Risk Cohort for Mental Conditions
https://openalex.org/W4400738283.kf1: Three anxiety-symptom trajectories (high-decreasing, moderate/low-stable, low-increasing) emerged; lower IQ predicted the high-decreasing class and higher IQ the low-increasing class.
https://openalex.org/W4400738283.effect_sizes: Low IQ OR=0.68 (high-decreasing); high IQ OR=1.95 (low-increasing)

https://openalex.org/W4415938882.sample_size: 1,466 Tourette trios; 6,714 autism trios; 5,880 control siblings
https://openalex.org/W4415938882.biomarkers: De novo and rare inherited coding variants (whole-exome)
https://openalex.org/W4415938882.kf1: Tourette syndrome showed exome-wide enrichment of protein-truncating de novo mutations distinct from autism, nominating PPP5C, EXOC1, and GXYLT1 as candidate risk genes.

https://openalex.org/W4413244017.kf1: Tourette syndrome and ADHD were each independently associated with reduced functional connectivity (additive, not interactive), but externalizing problems showed a TS-by-ADHD interaction.

https://openalex.org/W4413651023.kf1: A random-forest classifier of anxiety from structural MRI achieved AUC 0.70 in testing but near-chance (AUC 0.51) in hold-out validation, indicating limited generalizability.

https://openalex.org/W4415280910.kf1: Health workers learned essential newborn-care practices via digital learning and a neonatal simulator, but limited simulator access, connectivity, workload, and equipment shortages were barriers.

https://openalex.org/W4410837991.intervention_name: Essential Newborn Care (ENC) online course + low-dose high-frequency practice
https://openalex.org/W4410837991.kf1: Remote-oriented facilitators trained 236 health workers; all sites showed significant knowledge and bag-mask-ventilation skill improvements, maintained at endline.
